title: Review Completed Bags, Errors, and Task Timing on the Tipping Station Screen
summary: Use the Tipping Station HMI screen to navigate to and review the documented information categories for completed bags, errors, and task duration, then record only the values shown on the screen.
when_to_use: Use when you need to view the Tipping Station screen information described in the manual for completed bags, errors, and how long tasks take.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret field meanings, thresholds, or acceptable values because the source does not provide them.
Do not use this runbook for maintenance positioning, jogging, or manual tipper movement.
Do not use this runbook to change system settings or control production behavior; the source only supports viewing and recording displayed information.

responsibilities: Navigate to the Tipping Station screen using the documented HMI path.
Review the displayed categories for completed bags, errors, and task timing.
Record only the values shown on the screen.

safety_notes: This runbook is source-supported as a screen review activity only.
Record only the values displayed on the screen; do not infer meanings or thresholds not provided by the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Ability to navigate to the Tipping Station screen
Figure 4-7 or equivalent source-backed screen reference

system_preconditions: The HMI is available for navigation to the Tipping Station screen.

visual_references.description: Tipping Station screen showing the documented information categories and navigation target.
Smalls system overview screen supporting the SMALLS navigation entry point.
ACB system screen artifact relevant to ACB navigation context.

steps.title: Press SMALLS on the HMI
steps.purpose: Begin the documented navigation path to the Tipping Station screen.
steps.instruction: On the system HMI, press SMALLS.
steps.expected_result: The user enters the SMALLS navigation path described by the manual.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI accepts the SMALLS selection and allows continued navigation.
steps.failure_condition: The SMALLS selection is unavailable or does not allow continued navigation toward the Tipping Station screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The SMALLS screen entry point and the Smalls system overview context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the HMI does not allow access to the SMALLS path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu.

steps.title: Select ACB from the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Continue the documented navigation path toward the Tipping Station screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI shows that ACB has been selected and allows the next option to be chosen.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB option is not available or selecting it does not allow the next navigation step.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: ACB screen context relevant to the documented ACB selection path.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the ACB option is not present in the drop-down menu.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu.

steps.title: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
steps.purpose: Choose the documented option required before opening the Tipping Station screen.
steps.instruction: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the available options.
steps.expected_result: The ACB1 - AMT TT option is selected.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI shows the ACB1 - AMT TT selection and allows access to the tipper button.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB1 - AMT TT option is not available or cannot be selected.

actions.label: Choose ACB1 - AMT TT
actions.exact_action: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if "ACB1 - AMT TT" is not available in the options.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

steps.title: Open the Tipping Station screen
steps.purpose: Reach the screen that displays completed bag, error, and task timing information.
steps.instruction: Press the tipper button on the right side of the screen to open the "Tipping Station" screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tipping Station screen is displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The Tipping Station screen does not open or the displayed screen does not match the documented Tipping Station screen.

actions.label: Open Tipping Station
actions.exact_action: Press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Tipping Station screen and the tipper button location on the right side.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Tipping Station screen does not open.
Stop if the displayed screen does not show the documented categories of information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.
The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on how many bags are completed, errors, and how long tasks take.

steps.title: Review completed bag information
steps.purpose: Verify and capture the completed bag information available on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.instruction: Check the Tipping Station screen for information on how many bags are completed.
steps.expected_result: Completed bag information is visible on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen displays completed bag information as one of the documented information categories.
steps.failure_condition: Completed bag information is not visible on the Tipping Station screen.

actions.label: Review completed bags
actions.exact_action: Check the Tipping Station screen for information on how many bags are completed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Where completed bag information appears on the Tipping Station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Tipping Station screen does not display completed bag information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on how many bags are completed.

steps.title: Review error information
steps.purpose: Verify and capture the error information available on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.instruction: Check the Tipping Station screen for error information.
steps.expected_result: Error information is visible on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen displays error information as one of the documented information categories.
steps.failure_condition: Error information is not visible on the Tipping Station screen.

actions.label: Review errors
actions.exact_action: Check the Tipping Station screen for error information.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Where error information appears on the Tipping Station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Tipping Station screen does not display error information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on ... errors ...

steps.title: Review task timing information
steps.purpose: Verify and capture the task duration information available on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.instruction: Check the Tipping Station screen for information on how long tasks take.
steps.expected_result: Task timing information is visible on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen displays task duration information as one of the documented information categories.
steps.failure_condition: Task timing information is not visible on the Tipping Station screen.

actions.label: Review task timing
actions.exact_action: Check the Tipping Station screen for information on how long tasks take.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Where task duration or timing information appears on the Tipping Station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Tipping Station screen does not display task timing information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on ... how long tasks take.

steps.title: Record the displayed information
steps.purpose: Capture the observed screen values without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed information using only the values shown on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The displayed completed bag, error, and task timing information is recorded as shown.
steps.healthy_condition: Recorded values match what is displayed on the Tipping Station screen.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information cannot be clearly read or cannot be interpreted from the available source.

actions.label: Record displayed values
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed information using only the values shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed completed bag, error, and task timing information to be recorded exactly as shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen contents cannot be interpreted from the available source because field names, thresholds, or meanings are not provided.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on how many bags are completed, errors, and how long tasks take.

source_evidence.note: Candidate extraction note: The source confirms the categories of information available but does not provide exact field labels, expected values, or interpretation rules.

success_criteria: The Tipping Station screen is opened using the documented navigation path.
The user can view information for completed bags, errors, and task duration.
The displayed information is recorded using only the values shown on the screen.
healthy_conditions: The HMI allows navigation through SMALLS, ACB, and ACB1 - AMT TT.
The Tipping Station screen displays the documented categories of information.
Displayed values can be read directly from the screen.
failure_conditions: The Tipping Station screen does not display the documented categories of information.
The required navigation options are unavailable.
The screen contents cannot be interpreted from the available source because field names, thresholds, or meanings are not provided.
escalation_guidance: Stop if the Tipping Station screen does not display the documented categories of information.
Escalate if the screen contents cannot be interpreted from the available source because field names, thresholds, or meanings are not provided.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Tipping Station screen used to view bag completion counts, errors, and task timing information.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on how many bags are completed, errors, and how long tasks take.
To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact field labels on the Tipping Station screen.
The source does not provide expected values, thresholds, or interpretation rules for the displayed information.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not define downstream actions based on the reviewed values.
